titleStmt.title: SII 17.604: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 604. (A.R. No. 559 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription is dated in the 39th year of Tribhuvanavīradēva, a title assumed by Kulōttuṅga III.

It records a grant of land to god Śrīmūlasthānamuḍaiyār of Tiruvārūr, by Tiruvambalanallūruḍaiyār Araiyaṉ Piḷḷaiyāḻvi for the merit of her son Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyār. The former is stated to have had as her guardian, Kaṇṇandai Araiyaṉ Rājarājadēvaṉ alias Aṇukkappallavaraiyaṉ of Vāḻaippandal in Palkuṉṟakkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. The donor is also mentioned as Śōṟuḍaināyakaṉ Piḷḷaiyāḻvi in line 13.

The inscription gives in details the situation of the land and the donor's title to it. Śiṟukūṟṟanallūr in Vēḷāṉāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷaṉāḍu, Śiṟukaṇpūr in Muttūrkkūṟṟam in Rājarāja-Pāṇḍināḍu and Ammai-appanallūr are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu palkuṉṟak koṭṭattu vāḻaippantal kaṇṇantai Araiyaṉ Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]tevaṉāṉa Aṇukkappallavarayaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya tiruvampalanallūruṭaiyān Araiyaṉ piḷḷaiyāḻviyen Uṭaiyār tiruvārur cimulattāṉa
muṭaiyār koyil Ātitaṇṭecuratevar tiru muṉpu Eṉ makaṉ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyārkku naṉṟāka ṉān nīr vārttukkuṭutta nilamāvatu kulottuṅkacoḻa vaḷaṉāṭṭu veḷāṉāṭṭuc ciṟukūṟṟanallūril tiruvampalanallūruṭaiyāṉāṉa A
raiyaṉ kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉ pakkal cītaṉam peṟṟuṭaiya pottakapaṭi nilam Eṇ veliyum nilam kalantavāṟṟāl Eṉṟu Eḻutiṉamayil Iṉ nilam piṟittu taraveṇum Eṉṟu tiruvampalamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyan kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉai
ccoṉṉamaiyil Ivar piṟittu tantapaṭiyāy kaiykoṇṭa kācu pāti yiṟukkap paṟṟāy Uṭai yār tiruvāruruṭaiyārkkut tiruviḷakkuppuṟamāy Oṭṭukkaṭaittu koyilttāṉattāṟ Uṭal koṇṭu varukiṟa pottakappaṭi nilam patiṟṟuveliyil Eṉ Opāti nilam A
raiye mukkāṇiyum Aṉupavikkumiṭattu Ūr nattattu vaṭakkaṭaiyavum kaṭuvāyāṟṟaṅkaraiyil vaṭapakkattilum teṉpakkattilum kamuku niṉṟa nilattilum Akayāṟṟupaṭukaiyilum teṉpakkattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nikkavum viḷainilaṅkaḷ patiṟṟuveli vāykkālu
kkukkiḻakku kiḻkaṇṭamāṉa nilaṅkaḷ kaṇṭam toṟum kiḻpakkatte nikkavum niṉṟa nilat tukkutirai vaṭṭattu kulaikku kiḻakku teṉkaṇṭattu nilamum kiḻakkaṭaiya niṟka kaṭavatā kavum tiruveṇkāṭṭu viḷākattuk kollai kiḻakkaṭaiya niṟka kaṭavatākavum Iṉattoṟ paṭṭi Iṟai
yili pottakappaṭi nilam veliyum cimākecuranallūruṭaiyāṟ vikkiramacoḷīcuramuṭaiyār tevatāṉattu Iṟukkum nilam Onṟey Onpatu mākkāṇiyum Ākap pottakappaṭi nilam Iraṇṭe Onpatu mākkāṇiyum payiṟ piṟittu koṇṭa Ātittatevaṉ mayakkalil meṟkaṭaiya nilam
iraṇṭu māmukkāṇi civatavaṉamuṭaiyān ṉilam Iraṇṭumā melaippiccatevan mayakkalil meṟ kaṭaiya nilam Eḻumāvaraiyil teṟkaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭu māvaraikkāṇiyum kūttapirān mayakkalil kiḻkkaṭaiya nilam Āṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum kutiraivaṭṭattu vaṭa kaṇredundant.
kaṇṭattu Arumoḻinaṅkai kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam mākāṇiyum tenkaṇṭattu meṟkkaṭaiya nilam kaṭaiy nilam Araiye Orumāmukkāṇiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku nilam Āṟumāmukkāṇi nīkki kiḻak kaṭaiy nilam mūṉṟu māmukkāṇiyum nāṟṟaṅkāl nilam kālum picca
n tevaṉ toṭṭattu nilam ṉāṉmāvaraiyum Āka nilam Oṉṟe mukkāle nāṉmā varai In� Oṉṟe mukkāleṉāṉmāvaraiyum kiḻai māḷikaiyil teṟkaṭaiyakkuḻi Eḻu pattañcaraiyum Ampalattukku vaṭakkup paḻaiyāṟu kiḻaivaṉkuṭiiruppumaṉaiyāy ciṟukaṇpūruṭaiyāṉ Etirilicoḻanukku
vicattaṭaip parivattaṉai paṇṇiṉa māḷikaiyum taṉatu teṟkaṭaiyakkuḻi muppatum Ākakkuḻi nūṟṟañcaraiyum kuṭutta nilattiṉ maṉaikuḻi muppattiraṇṭum tiruveṇkāṭṭu viḷākattukkollaiyil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Orumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaiyum Āka kollaivaṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭe mākāṇi Araikkāṇi muṉti
rikaiyum nattam kuḻi nūṟṟumuppattu Eḻaraiyum Ākap pottakappaṭi nilam Eṇveliyum Uṭaiyāṟ tiruvara(r)rūr cī mulattāṉa muṭaiyār koyil Ātitaṇṭecuratevaṟ tiru muṉpu tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟkku muppattoṉpatāvatu 3 10 9 kārmutal nir vāṟttu kuṭutteṉ Eṉp pattar vāḻaippantalk kaṇṇantai Araiyaṉ Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]teva ṉāṉa
Aṇukkap pallavaraiyaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya coṟuṭai nāyakaṉ piḷḷaiyāḻviyeṉ Iṉṉilattu tevatāṉa Āṇṭu mutal tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa Ammaiyappaṉallūr Uṭaṉ kūṭṭi Uṭal koṇṭuvarukaiyil kamuku niṉṟa taṟai Uḷḷiṭṭa nilattu mel Eṟṟamuṇṭākilum Uṭal tuṇṭamākilum nāyaṉārkku Āvatu Iṉṉilam Eṇveliyum nāya
ṉārkku nāyāraca paṭikku Ivai Aṇukkappallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Ippiramāṇattil tiriviṭṭapaṭi Aṟiveṉ (a) Aṇukkappallavaraiyaṉ kaṇa[kku kiyaluṭaiy]āṉ Eḻuttu:— Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pūṇṭi Uṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉa Āḷavantāṉ Eḻuttu:—ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cāttampāṭi Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu:—ivarkaḷ veṇṭa Ippiramāṇam Eḻutineṉ Irā[ja*]rā[ja*] pāṇṭi nā
ṭṭu muttūrk kūṟṟattu ciṟukaṇpūruṭaiyāṉ Ulakapimaṉṉāṉa Etirili coḻaneṉ Eḻuttu .. mulappiramāṇattil Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvampalamuṭaiyāṉa ṇattā ṉ kaṅkai koṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu :—ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟukaṇpūruṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭap perumāḷ Eḻuttu ..ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟukaṇpūruṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu:— Ippaṭi Aṟi
veṉ tiruvampalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvāccirāmamuṭaiyāṉ Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]tevaṉāṉa vikkiramacoḻa Aṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.604 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
